product_overview: A Streamlit-based analytics platform that helps O&M engineers, asset managers, and performance analysts upload solar inverter data, review fleet performance, detect faults, and inspect MPPT behavior. It turns raw SMA datasets into operational insights through ranking dashboards, anomaly reporting, and channel-level diagnostics.
core_goals: Upload and normalize SMA solar dataset files for analysis
Review fleet-wide inverter performance and comparative ranking
Detect common solar inverter and MPPT fault conditions
Inspect inverter-level MPPT voltage and current behavior to isolate underperforming channels

features.name: Data Ingestion
features.description: Upload SMA solar files, validate the data, and prepare it for downstream analytics.
user_flows: Navigate to /Upload -> Upload an .xlsx file -> Observe processing progress -> See successful data processing confirmation

Navigate to /Upload -> Upload an .xlsx file with invalid or incomplete required metrics -> Observe validation feedback -> Correct the file and upload again -> See successful data processing confirmation

features.name: Performance Ranking
features.description: View fleet-level inverter rankings and summary performance metrics.
user_flows: Navigate to /Ranking -> Review fleet performance metrics -> Inspect the performance ranking chart -> Examine the detailed ranking table
Navigate to /Ranking -> Review fleet performance metrics -> Interact with the performance chart -> Compare inverter positions across the fleet

features.name: Anomaly Reporting
features.description: Review detected solar faults and inspect specific anomaly types.
user_flows: Navigate to /Anomalies -> Review the anomaly scatter plot -> Filter to a specific fault type -> Inspect the matching anomaly records
Navigate to /Anomalies -> Review the anomaly scatter plot -> Select a fault pattern of interest -> Compare anomaly instances across the report

features.name: MPPT Analysis
features.description: Analyze inverter-level MPPT voltage and current behavior with heatmaps and alerts.
user_flows: Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis -> Select an inverter -> View the voltage and current heatmaps -> Review underperformance alerts
Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis -> Select an inverter -> Toggle between current and voltage heatmaps -> Compare channel-level behavior across the selected inverter

routes.description: Dashboard landing page with KPI overview
File upload and data processing page
Solar fault and anomaly detection report
Channel-level MPPT behavior analysis and heatmaps

features.name: Data Ingestion
features.description: Upload and normalize SMA solar datasets
user_interactions: Upload an .xlsx file using the file uploader

features.name: Performance Ranking
features.description: View composite scores and ranking of all inverters

features.name: Anomaly Reporting
user_interactions: Filter or inspect specific fault types

features.name: MPPT Analysis
features.description: Deep dive into channel-level electrical data
user_interactions: Select an inverter from the dropdown
Toggle between Current and Voltage heatmaps
